calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hrg
Off Calendar Apr-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Thomas Richard Jones, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Dutch Enterprises, Inc. Doing Business as CRDN.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) K2 Environmental, Inc.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 20 dismissed without prejudice.
Steven Depper sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $39,779.91
Pre-Judgment Interest: $15,238.00 at the annual rate of 10%.
Costs: $410.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $55,427.91
Judgment signed in open court.
